summary: Executed frontend-only validation on public URL for CRM Sales Dashboard. Core interactions (load, theme toggle, sidebar collapse, KPI cards, trend tab switching, chart section rendering, and responsive checks) passed without runtime API dependency.

issues: Repeated Recharts console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' during render/responsive transitions.

action_items: Investigate Recharts container sizing lifecycle (ResponsiveContainer parent dimensions during initial mount and viewport changes) to remove width/height -1 warnings.
Consider splitting /app/frontend/src/App.css (>1200 lines) into modular stylesheet files for maintainability.
critical_code_review_comments: App.css is very large (1229 lines) and should be split into focused style modules per dashboard section/component.
Some section/card wrappers lack dedicated data-testid on action chips (minor testability gap), though critical controls already have robust test IDs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend is fully static/hardcoded and no API calls were detected in src. Core flows passed on https://maven-sales-hub.stage-preview.emergentagent.com. Follow-up should focus on eliminating Recharts width/height console warnings and optional CSS modularization.
rca of the issue: RCA for console warning: ResponsiveContainer in Recharts can evaluate parent size as invalid (-1) when container dimensions are unresolved momentarily during mount/layout transitions (including sidebar collapse and viewport changes). Mitigation: ensure stable explicit parent dimensions/min-width/min-height for chart containers and defer chart render until container size is measurable.
